title: The Cardamom Act, 1965
full_text: The Cardamom Act, 1965 इलायची अधिनियम, 1965 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196542 Act Number: 42 Enactment Date: 1965-12-09 Act Year: 1965 Short Title: The Cardamom Act, 1965 Hindi Title: इलायची अधिनियम, 1965 Long Title: An Act to provide for the development under the control of the Union of the cardamom industry. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Commerce Enforcement Date: 05-04-1966 Notification: 5th April, 1966, vide notification No. G.S.R. 543, dated the 5th April, 1966, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i) except Chapter III. 11th April, 1966, vide notification No. G.S.R. 380, dated 5th March, 1966, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i) in respect of ss. 14 and 15. 12th July, 1966, vide notification No. S.O. 2166(E), dated 12th July, 1966, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii) in respect of Chapter III.
